RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, TONY
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, TONY DUNKLIN, CYNTHIA

JOE BRAVO ATTY FOR THE PLTF TONY JONES, IN PRO PER 9:10AM DEPT #8, JUDGE GEORGE TYLER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. TERMS AND CONDITIONS STATED ON RECORD. PARTIES STIPULATED THAT DEFENDANTS THAT POSSESSION HAS BEEN SURRENDERED. PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE PREMISES TODAY AT 6:00PM. DEFENDANTS OWED $2,700.00 TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $300.00 ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH, NOV, DEC, JAN, FEB AND BALANCE OF $700.00 TO PAY BY 15-MAR-94. IF DEFENDANTS DEFAULTED ON PAYMENT, THE BALANCE WILL BE DUE IMMEDIATELY PLUS ATTORNEYS FEES. IF DEFENDANT FAILED TO VACATE OR MAKE PAYMENTS, PLTF WILL FILE A DECLARATION BY EX-PARTE APPLICATION AND NOTIFY DEFENDANTS WITHIN 24HRS AT THEIR NEW ADDRESS 514 S. HILL BLVD, DALY CITY, CA. 94014. SECURITY DEPOSITS WILL BE DEALT SEPERATELY. PARTIES STIPULATE TO WAIVE CLAIMS TO EACH OTHER.
